Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 44
DMG: 29 Dmg Bonus: 152
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +4 MANA: +20
Effect: Nature's Wrath (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 46
WT: 4.5 Size: LARGE
Class: RNG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 09 2002 at 1:44 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Picked one up yesterday in KC in RCY. had many Adds but I kept them all mezzed totally held them down. I also got myslef a Blackjack and guess who's Ranger was only created a Day prior Hello he has pretty nice items now I've been twinking him so that when he gets to the level of the things I have given him his skills will be there. i was in a group i just randomly started up in KC. we were holding Rroom and we got trained out. while regrouping i saw a monk fighting a sentry of sathir. he had to zone so we finished it off. this thing drops and the group tells me to keep it since i am the only ranger. and i have to say this thing roxs. 110 DD is great. althought it does pull aggro a bit, but no real problem when i have jolt out. so just to make sure everyone gets it. this thing drops off of a sentry of Sathir.

# Mar 25 2002 at 9:50 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591767079068
Sage
266 posts
Pick up an abandoned orc shovel, or similar fast 2hb to train up your skill. the delay on this is relatively high, and you won't train up fast. The abandoned orc shovel, on the other hand, has a very low delay, and while the damage on it stinks, you'll train up much faster.
▲ Page top
Proc? Damage :)
QuoteReply
# Dec 22 2001 at 10:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765710861
32 posts
The 110dd unresistable proc is pretty sweet, but even sweeter is double crushing for an average of 100 damage each hit.
The most I have done in one round of damage with this thing is 367 damage (including the proc of course) and it's gonna get better once I level enough to raise 2hb past 200. (Or get my STR past 130 :p )


Edited, Sat Dec 22 22:35:40 2001
▲ Page top
A few things...
QuoteReply
# Nov 18 2001 at 9:23 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592247429711
Scholar
70 posts




1. It seems they have changed the way damage bonus is listed. Every one of my 51 rangers weapons now have a damage bonus listed. All of his 1 handed weapons have a damage bonus of 8. I assume this is the regular bonus that all weapons get beginning around level 29. Now the bonus on my Natures Wrath is 18 which would make the 2hand bonus 10 at 51 since the regular bonus is 8 at 51(8+10 = 18, duh).

2. This thing seems to proc for me a lot. I'm not really sure if different weapons have different rates at which they proc or if the only determining factor is DEX, but this seems to proc 2 or 3 times almost every fight. I don't remember seeing this on any other procing weapon I've had, and I'm pretty sure my Fluxbladed axe doesn't proc that often, even in my main hand. Also all the other procing weapons I've had were 1 handers w/ dly 26 or less, this has a dly of 44 so I am getting more procs on fewer swings. Of course maybe there is a bonus to the chance of procing on a 2handed weapon also (Anyone care to comment on that?) Of course in the end it may just be that since Nature's Wrath is unresistable maybe it just seems to proc more cuz I am more like to notice the ones that land. (I think resisted procs only give one line of text "a_mob_01 resists your proc" whereas ones that land give 3 lines: Cast, damage, and emote and the spell effects)


Now if I could just get my 2hb skill up so I can more damage than just what i do with the proc.
▲ Page top
RE: A few things...
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2002 at 4:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761195679
203 posts
I've had a swarmcaller for a while. I have noticed a HUGE increase in procs going from 96 to 106 dex.
▲ Page top
RE: A few things...
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2001 at 2:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1611533819471
69 posts
Just acquired one, but with my less than stellar skill, will take some time before I use this regularly.

The Proc seems to based on several factors:
DEX, Skill, and Attack Rating

I have 4 Procing weapons. By far the best proc'er is the Dragon Horn Ykesha (a piercing weapon). I believe this has to do with the 3 factors mentioned above. Pre 51, Rangers max their Dual Wield out at 210, obviously higher than pre-51 offense alone. So the extra skill in this category aids in the proc (versus the lack of that extended skill while using a 2HS/B). Being 2-Handed weapons, both the Swarmcaller and Nature's Wrath do not utilize the dual wield skill, but rather just the offense skill.

Dexterity, it has been shown in other posts and at other sites, is a contributing factor in landing a blow, landing a critical blow, and double attacking. The extra to hit boost from Dexterity should provide some additional chance to Proc for the weapon in question, as it aids in landing the swing.

I don't believe I need to say anything about attack rating that I haven't already touched on in the previous two paragraphs, except that if you spent all your time with blades up to the lofty level you have reached, good luck moving your skill in 2HB. I did just that, and now at 50 have a hefty 37 2HB skill against Mobs that hit in the low 100's.

Lolanya 50 Ranger
Sacred Legion of Tunare
Innoruuk
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2001 at 7:00 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
yupyupz... yummii weap...

Really lucky, got one for 5kp on Veeshan a few days ago... just after I sold my Tolan's Gaunts and rebreather. But now I have to start practicing a new weapon skill altogether :-(

My guildies <Obsidian Guard> said that the proc was also completely UNRESISTABLE, and would always hit for the full 110 dd... Was looking for a nice 2h to use in case I got bored... this one's gotta be great for pure damage.

Oh ya... if you're planning to use something like this in the future, don't do what I did for 43 levels and just practice your bladed weap skills: Balance them all... I'm having to practice a new weap skill altogether on mobs hitting 100+'s at times... and I'm pretty much hitting for nothing <but they still taunt onto me!! ack!>... kinda scary.

<-Yarlen-<<
>>-Wailingdoom->
<Obsidian Guard>
